other_observers: many ,many including Mark Peterson , Bill Maynard , Glen Walbeck , Joey Kellner et al
description: Medium sized white tern with long wings and short deeply forked tail . Dark black extends to nape , longish black bill tipped pale yellow. In flight outer 5 primaries show up as a darker gray , rest of wing very pale gray almost white in some light. At rest wing tips just extend beyond tail.Behavior: Either perched into wind on tree branches in middle of Manitou Lake , or patrolling along adjacent beaver ponds and plunge diving for fish.Call: None heardPlumage: adult summer
photographer: Photographer: John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond
